info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: This API provides tools for building and managing ecommerce platforms, allowing users to handle products, orders, and customer data efficiently.

post.description: Creates a new user record in the system with the provided details.

requestBody.description: Details of the user to be registered

500.description: Internal server error

get.description: Fetches details of a user by their unique user ID.

500.description: Internal server error

post.summary: Add an item to the cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the user's cart.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

400.description: Invalid item data or insufficient stock

500.description: Internal server error

get.description: Fetches the current contents of the specified user's cart.

500.description: Internal server error

delete.description: Removes a specific item from the user's cart.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the product to remove

404.description: Item not found in cart or user not found

500.description: Internal server error

put.description: Updates the quantities of items in the user's cart.

500.description: Internal server error

get.description: Fetches the status of a payment by its unique ID.

500.description: Internal server error

post.description: Handles incoming webhook events from the payment gateway.

500.description: Internal server error

post.description: Starts the process of creating a new payment transaction using the provided payment details.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input data.

500.description: Internal server error while initiating payment.

get.description: Fetches a list of all products available in the catalog.

200.description: A list of products successfully retrieved.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving products.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Allows the addition of a new product by specifying product details.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid product data.

500.description: Internal server error while adding the product.

get.description: Fetches details of a single product specified by the product ID.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product to retrieve.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving the product.

get.summary: Search for products based on various filters
get.description: Allows searching for products using a combination of query parameters like category, price range, and sorting options.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Optional unique request identifier for tracking purpose.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: Optional client identifier for the request origin.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field name to sort the results by.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid query parameters.

500.description: Internal server error while searching for products.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Creates a new order for a user identified by userId, containing one or more products.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user placing the order.

500.description: Internal server error while placing the order.

get.description: Fetches details of an order specified by the order ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to retrieve.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving the order.

delete.description: Cancels an order specified by the order ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to be cancelled.

500.description: Internal server error while cancelling the order.

get.summary: Retrieve orders for a specific user
get.description: Fetches all orders placed by a user identified by userId.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user whose orders are to be retrieved.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving user's orders.

post.description: Allows addition of a new shipping address for a user or order.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid address data.

500.description: Internal server error while adding the address.

put.description: Modify the details of an existing shipping address using its unique identifier.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the address to be updated.

requestBody.description: Details of the shipping address to be updated.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid address details or missing parameters.

404.description: Address not found with the provided addressId.

500.description: Internal server error while processing the update.

get.description: Retrieve the current shipping status and other details of an order using its unique identifier.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the order to be tracked.

200.description: Current tracking details of the order.

404.description: Order not found with the provided orderId.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving tracking information.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: Response received from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction provided by the payment gateway.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before applying discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order.

currency.description: Currency in which the order amount is specified.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

paymentStatus.description: Current status of the order payment.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

active.description: Indicates if the user's account is active.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product ordered.

price.description: Price per unit of the product.

discount.description: Discount applied per unit of the product.

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after applying discount.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

price.description: Price per unit of the product.

discount.description: Discount applied per unit of the product.

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after applying discount.

currency.description: Currency in which the prices are specified.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier company handling the delivery.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date and time for the order.

trackingId.description: Tracking ID provided by the courier service.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for all items in the cart before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied across all items in the cart.

currency.description: Currency in which the cart amounts are specified.

userId.description: Identifier of the user to whom the cart belongs.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after applying discounts.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

pincode.description: Postal code of the user's address.

country.description: Country where the address is located.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the address entry was created.

phone.description: Contact phone number for the address.

state.description: State or region of the address.

userId.description: Identifier of the user to whom the address belongs.

addressId.description: Unique identifier for the address entry.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the address was last updated.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

userType.description: Type of the user (e.g., new, returning, guest).

email.description: Email address of the user for communication.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalogue.

rating.description: Average user rating of the product.

description.description: Detailed description of the product features.
description.example: Latest model with enhanced performance and battery life.

currency.description: Currency in which the product price is specified.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

stock.description: Number of units available in stock.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product information was last updated.

price.description: Proposed selling price of the product.

rating.description: User-rated quality score of the product.

available.description: Denotes if the product should be available for purchase.

description.example: The next generation smartwatch with advanced health tracking and modular design.

currency.description: Currency for setting the product price.

brand.description: Manufacturing or brand name associated with the product.

quantity.description: New quantity for the product in the cart.

productId.description: Identifier of the product in the cart to be updated.

operation.description: Type of operation to be performed on the cart item (e.g., add, remove, update).

orderId.description: Identifier of the order for which payment is made.

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment chosen (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer).

paymentGateway.description: Payment gateway through which the payment is processed.

pincode.description: Zip or postal code of the new address.

country.description: Country where the new address is located.

phone.description: Contact number associated with the address.

state.description: State or province for the address.

addressLine.description: Street and number for the detailed address.

userId.description: Identifier of the user adding or updating the address.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was initiated.

orderId.description: Order identifier related to the payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used in the transaction.

currency.description: Currency in which the payment was made.

transactionId.description: Transaction ID provided by the payment gateway.
